prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This report focuses on the Tenant Satisfaction Measures (TSM) specific to large registered landlords in England, examining tenant feedback regarding landlord services, repairs, complaints handling, and safety checks. Given that it explicitly addresses the regulatory framework and tenant experiences within England's housing sector, it applies solely to England.
